email.subject: RCA - JOB1 Failure - PROD
email.body:
Dear Team,

The scheduled VisualCron job JOB1 failed in the PROD environment.

Root Cause
-----------
Missing permissions

Business Impact
---------------
Job delayed

Technical Impact
----------------
Batch blocked

Recommended Resolution
----------------------
Fix permissions

Please let us know if any additional information is required.

Regards,

AI L1 Support Agent
